task: Book a one-way economy class flight for 1 adult passenger from RIC to JFK departing on January 1, 2027. Submit the search to complete the task.

question: What is the capital of Switzerland?

task: Go to https://www.google.com/recaptcha/api2/demo and click the 'I'm not a robot' checkbox. The checkbox is visually obvious but lives inside a cross-origin iframe, so DOM click by ref will likely fail and visual fallback must take over.
